executive_summary: Xiang La Yue Chili is planning processed packaged food import + TikTok/social commerce expansion from China to Singapore. This report is a first-pass preparation pack to help a founder identify key compliance, tax/accounting, localization, and TikTok-first go-to-market steps before engaging Singapore professionals.

compliance_checklist.item: Confirm whether your importer must be registered and whether the chili sauce category has additional controls; document your import flow and responsibilities.
compliance_checklist.rationale: Importer setup and food category controls can block first shipment if missed.

compliance_checklist.item: Finalize HS classification, landed cost model, and required shipment documents; align Incoterms and decide who files permits (you vs distributor).
compliance_checklist.rationale: Incorrect HS codes or missing documents commonly cause clearance delays and extra fees.

compliance_checklist.item: Prepare Singapore-ready labels: ingredients list, allergen declarations, net weight, manufacturer/importer info, storage instructions, and country-of-origin where required; keep label versions controlled.
compliance_checklist.rationale: Label non-compliance can trigger relabeling, disposal, or recall risk.
evidence_needed: Final ingredient list (with percentages if needed)

compliance_checklist.item: Decide whether to include a nutrition information panel; review all on-pack and TikTok ad claims (e.g., 'healthy', 'low sodium') for substantiation and compliance-safe wording.
compliance_checklist.rationale: Unsubstantiated nutrition/health claims are a high-risk compliance and ad rejection vector.

compliance_checklist.item: Implement batch/lot traceability (factory batch → shipment → warehouse → customer) and a recall playbook; define complaint handling SOP.
compliance_checklist.rationale: Traceability reduces the blast radius of quality incidents and speeds regulator/customer responses.

compliance_checklist.item: Decide legal entity + incorporation approach; set up CorpPass and a compliance calendar for filings.
compliance_checklist.rationale: Smooth filings and government portal access reduce avoidable delays.

compliance_checklist.item: Draft a privacy notice + consent language for lead capture, loyalty programs, delivery orders, and TikTok campaigns; define retention & access controls.
compliance_checklist.rationale: TikTok-first growth often collects customer data early; consent issues create brand and enforcement risk.

tax_and_accounting_checklist.item: Set up bookkeeping workflow (invoices, marketplace fees, shipping, storage) and inventory tracking (COGS, landed cost, write-offs) suitable for Singapore reporting.
tax_and_accounting_checklist.rationale: For imported packaged foods, inventory + landed cost accuracy is critical for unit economics, tax, and investor/distributor diligence.

tax_and_accounting_checklist.item: Assess GST registration triggers, invoicing requirements, and how GST applies to local sales vs marketplace/social commerce; confirm with a Singapore accountant.
tax_and_accounting_checklist.rationale: GST mistakes are common and can be costly; early design prevents rework.

tax_and_accounting_checklist.item: Map how money moves (TikTok Shop/marketplaces, payment processors, FX, chargebacks) and ensure fees/taxes are recorded correctly; align with a finance owner.
tax_and_accounting_checklist.rationale: Social commerce often creates reconciliation complexity; clean mappings avoid surprises in margin and tax.

localization_recommendations.recommendation: Package the chili sauce around Singapore-relevant usage occasions (noodles, hotpot, toast, fried rice) and make the spice level explicit on-pack.
localization_recommendations.rationale: Improves conversion in retail/social commerce by reducing uncertainty and increasing trial intent.

localization_recommendations.recommendation: Ensure English label clarity (ingredients/allergens/storage) and keep Chinese branding secondary; avoid translation mismatches between languages.
localization_recommendations.rationale: Reduces compliance risk and customer complaints, especially online where labels are scrutinized.

localization_recommendations.recommendation: Launch with a small trial bottle and a bundle (2–3 flavors/heat levels) to maximize sampling and gifting; test price points vs local competitors.
localization_recommendations.rationale: Pack architecture is a fast lever for TikTok conversion and repeat purchase.

tiktok_social_commerce_launch_suggestion.suggestion: Build a 30-day content calendar around real usage: hotpot/noodles/toast/fried-rice recipes, 'one spoon' heat reactions, and before/after flavor tests with common Singapore foods.
tiktok_social_commerce_launch_suggestion.why_it_helps: Makes the product legible in 2–5 seconds and drives trial intent through repeatable recipe formats.
tiktok_social_commerce_launch_suggestion.prerequisite: Assign an on-site content owner and a weekly shoot schedule.

tiktok_social_commerce_launch_suggestion.suggestion: Run a micro-creator sampling program (10–20 Singapore creators) with a simple brief: 1 recipe + 1 tasting reaction + 1 usage tip; use trackable codes and a small starter bundle.
tiktok_social_commerce_launch_suggestion.why_it_helps: Creator sampling quickly validates flavor-market fit and content angles with local audiences.
tiktok_social_commerce_launch_suggestion.prerequisite: Creator brief, sampling budget, and fulfillment capacity.

tiktok_social_commerce_launch_suggestion.suggestion: Create a 'label-safe claims' playbook for ads and creators (no disease/health claims; avoid 'low sodium/healthy' unless substantiated); pre-approve scripts and on-screen text.
tiktok_social_commerce_launch_suggestion.why_it_helps: Reduces ad rejections and compliance risk while keeping messaging consistent across UGC.
tiktok_social_commerce_launch_suggestion.prerequisite: Approved copy guidelines and a claim-by-claim review against your label.

tiktok_social_commerce_launch_suggestion.suggestion: Validate TikTok Shop economics with a controlled test: 1 hero SKU + 1 bundle, A/B thumbnail + hook, and a clear usage CTA; track CAC, AOV, repeat intent, and refund/return rate.
tiktok_social_commerce_launch_suggestion.why_it_helps: Confirms whether social commerce can work profitably before scaling inventory and ad spend.
tiktok_social_commerce_launch_suggestion.prerequisite: Shop setup, product listings, and basic analytics (pixel/events) with defined KPIs.

risk_register.issue: Importer setup, HS classification, or missing documents may delay first shipment or increase landed costs.
risk_register.evidence: Packaged/processed food imports may require importer readiness and category checks; customs processes rely on correct classification and documents. (See citation: sg-sfa-importer-registration)
risk_register.next_action: Confirm importer-of-record, validate HS code with a broker, and pre-build a shipment document pack + SOP with your forwarder/distributor.

risk_register.issue: Non-compliant labels or unsubstantiated nutrition/health claims can trigger relabeling, ad rejection, or enforcement risk.
risk_register.evidence: Packaged food labels commonly require ingredients/allergens and other mandatory particulars; claims must be supportable. (See citation: sg-food-labelling)
risk_register.next_action: Create a label compliance checklist, do a claim-by-claim review, and (if making claims) plan lab testing before scaling ads.

risk_register.issue: Over-claiming (health/quality) or poor moderation can cause ad rejection or reputational damage.
risk_register.evidence: TikTok-first growth requires supportable claims and brand safety controls. (See citation: tiktok-commerce)
risk_register.next_action: Create claim guidelines (aligned to label-safe wording), moderation SOP, and creator briefing templates; pre-approve scripts.

risk_register.issue: Lead capture and loyalty programs may collect personal data without proper notice/consent.
risk_register.evidence: PDPA requires consent/purpose limitation and reasonable security for customer data.
risk_register.next_action: Draft privacy notice, define data inventory and retention, and audit vendors (CRM, delivery, analytics).

risk_register.issue: Inadequate bookkeeping and GST readiness can create compliance exposure and make unit economics unclear.
risk_register.evidence: GST and record-keeping obligations require early finance setup.
risk_register.next_action: Implement monthly close, channel-level revenue + fees mapping, and consult a Singapore accountant on GST triggers and e-commerce treatment.

citations.title: Singapore packaged-food localization heuristics (chili sauce/condiments)
citations.snippet: For bottled chili sauce, localize by clarifying spice level on-pack, offering a smaller trial size, and optimizing for TikTok-friendly usage occasions (noodles, hotpot, toast). Ensure English label clarity, and test pricing against local alternatives. Valid…

citations.title: SFA food importer registration & regulated food imports – overview
citations.snippet: For packaged/processed food imports into Singapore, confirm whether the importer must register and what food categories are regulated. Plan for product documentation (ingredient composition, manufacturer details, certificates, shelf-life), traceability, and…

citations.title: TikTok-first launch – operating considerations
citations.snippet: For TikTok-first go-to-market: plan short-form content pipeline, creator collaborations, moderation/brand safety, and measurement (pixel/events). Ensure claims in ads are supportable, and align offers with fulfillment capacity.

citations.title: Nutrition and health claims: substantiation and ad/label safety
citations.snippet: Avoid unsubstantiated nutrition/health claims on labels and ads (e.g., 'boosts immunity', 'fat-burning'). If you make nutrition claims (e.g., 'low sodium'), ensure you can substantiate with lab testing and compliant definitions. Align TikTok ad copy with la…

citations.title: Processed food import: customs clearance + importer-of-record checkpoints
citations.snippet: For importing packaged foods, validate HS classification, duties/taxes treatment, import permits (as applicable), and who is the importer-of-record. Maintain supplier specifications, batch traceability, and a recall-ready paper trail to reduce border delays.

citations.title: Food labelling essentials: ingredients, allergens, country of origin, and storage
citations.snippet: Packaged food labels commonly need a name/description, ingredients list (descending order), allergen declaration, net quantity, manufacturer/importer details, storage instructions, and country of origin where required. Ensure bilingual packaging does not cr…

advisor_ready_memo:
Advisor-ready memo (bring to lawyer/accountant/local partners):
1) Business snapshot: Xiang La Yue Chili (China → Singapore), entry mode: processed packaged food import + TikTok/social commerce; products/services: Bottled Hunan chili sauce (shelf-stable, glass jar).
2) Decisions needed (next 2 weeks): entity setup approach, importer-of-record/distributor arrangement, HS code + clearance flow, label/claim strategy, and sales channels (retail/distributor/TikTok shop).
3) Key questions for advisors:
   - Import/compliance: What SFA/importer requirements apply to our chili sauce category and supply chain? Any controlled ingredients?
   - Labelling/claims: What must be on the label (ingredients/allergens/origin) and what claims are risky or require substantiation?
   - Tax/accounting: GST registration triggers for our projected turnover and channels; invoicing and record-keeping setup for marketplaces?
   - Data/privacy: PDPA-compliant consent language for marketing and delivery/loyalty workflows.
4) Evidence pack to prepare: ingredient/allergen list, manufacturer dossier, label proofs, revenue model + projections, and vendor list (forwarder, warehouse/3PL, TikTok/ads tooling).

Disclaimer: Not legal/tax advice; verify with official sources and qualified Singapore professionals.
disclaimer: Not legal/tax advice. This is a first-pass preparation checklist for SMEs. Verify requirements with qualified Singapore professionals and official sources.
